ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the web development tool */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on user interactions */,
  "tag_filter" TEXT /* Tags associated with the tool for filtering */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the tool (e.g., Free, Freemium) */,
  "functionality" TEXT /* Description of the tool's functionality */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the tool was added to the marketplace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform supported by the tool (e.g., Windows, macOS, Linux) */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tools_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Code Tools, Design Tools) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_categories" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Designer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction event */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool being interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the tool */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, click) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the session started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the session ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the developer joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_versions_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id")
)
